query:
SELECT c.contract_no, c.approve_date, c.commission_net, c.section,
       i.updated_by, i.updated_at
FROM contracts c
INNER JOIN installments i ON i.contract_no = c.contract_no AND i.section = c.section
WHERE c.commission_net IS NOT NULL AND c.commission_net > 0 
  AND i.updated_by IS NOT NULL AND i.updated_by != '' AND i.updated_by != 'NULL'
ORDER BY i.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 5

WHERE c.commission_net IS NOT NULL AND c.commission_net > 0

LIMIT 5
